cases.title: View Company Members List
cases.note: Members table loads on /company/members. Columns: Name, Email, Role, Status visible. 11 members shown.

cases.title: Search Members by Name or Email
cases.note: Search input visible and functional; filters members by name. Email search also works.

cases.title: Members List Pagination
cases.note: Only 11 members in org - pagination threshold not reached. Cannot verify Load More / pagination.

cases.title: View Member Role
cases.note: Role labels visible: Administrator, Manager, Operator roles shown in table.

cases.title: Invite New Member
cases.note: Invite dialog opens with email textarea and role dropdown. Form submission works.

cases.title: Invite Member - Invalid Email Format
cases.note: Form validation triggered on invalid email; error message shown.

cases.title: Change Member Role
cases.note: Edit role option available in Actions dropdown for active members.

cases.title: Active Member Actions Dropdown
cases.note: Active member dropdown shows: Edit role, Block user, Delete, Login on behalf.

cases.title: Blocked Member Actions Dropdown
cases.note: Blocked member dropdown shows: Edit role, Unblock user, Delete, Login on behalf.

cases.title: Block Member
cases.note: Block user click on Bence Palvin did not change status. Emily Johnson (Org Maintainer) may lack block permission. Action appeared to trigger but status remained Active.

cases.title: Unblock Member
cases.note: Depends on B2C-MBR-010; cannot test unblock if block fails.

cases.title: Delete Member
cases.note: Not tested to avoid data destruction. Destructive action skipped in non-teardown run.

cases.title: Member Status Badge
cases.note: Active and Blocked status badges visible and correctly colored in members table.

cases.title: Login on Behalf (from Members)
cases.note: Login on behalf option present in Actions dropdown for all member types.

cases.title: Filter Members by Role
cases.note: Role filter dropdown present; filtering works.

cases.title: Invited Member Status
cases.note: Invited members show Invited status badge; Actions show resend invite option.

cases.title: Members - Mobile Layout
cases.note: Mobile viewport not tested in this run (desktop 1920x1080).
